settings.contact-agreement.checkbox.labe: I agree that you may occasionally contact me.
settings.contact-agreement.checkbox.note: I'd love to hear how Haiku.lt is working for you! Expect at most one personal message per year — a quick chat or email to understand your experience and help us improve.
settings.contact-agreement.description: To improve Haiku.lt, we may sometimes need your opinion, information about how you use the system, or what you feel is missing from it. On the other hand, we don't want to disturb users who just want to use the system. Therefore, we ask if you agree that we may occasionally contact you:
